user.title: PS5 Companion
user.description: Detected {candidate_count} PS5 MQTT power switch(es). Pick which one corresponds to this PS5, and optionally select a speaker to delegate volume controls to.

data_description.power_switch: The switch entity published by the ps5-mqtt add-on for THIS PS5.
data_description.volume_delegate: Volume controls on the PS5 Companion entity will be forwarded to this speaker. Leave blank to hide volume controls.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one PS5 Companion entry is supported. To set up a different PS5, please file an issue.
abort.playstation_network_missing: The PlayStation Network integration is not configured. Please add it via Settings → Devices & Services → Add Integration → PlayStation Network first, then retry.
abort.ps5_mqtt_missing: No PS5 MQTT power switches detected. Please install and configure the ps5-mqtt add-on from the Home Assistant add-on store, pair it with your PS5, and retry.
abort.legacy_setup_present: An older YAML-based PS5 setup is still active. To avoid duplicate / conflicting entities, please remove these entities first: {entities}. See the MIGRATION section in the integration README.
